title: Idempotent Consumers
description: Implement idempotent consumer patterns to safely process messages with "At-Least-Once" delivery guarantees. Design message processing logic that prevents side-effect duplication when re-processing events.
objectives: Implement idempotent consumer patterns to safely process messages with "At-Least-Once" delivery guarantees.
Design message processing logic that prevents side-effect duplication when re-processing events.
